Appearances (Via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MELISA ROSADINI-KNOTT, Esq. of Peiffer Wolf Carr Kane Conway & Wise, LLP (Tel: 415-766-3545) For Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JOHN DOE's Application For Orders Approving Certificates Of Merit (C.C.P. 340.1(I)) And Authorizing Service On Defendants.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's "application for orders approving certificates of merit (C.C.P. 340.1(l) and authorizing service on defendants" is granted.

Counsel for prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.
